description: Broad-market volatility spike: erratic intraday swings, elevated volume on fear rather than trend, and conflicting headlines. The setup is unconfirmed.

news: Volatility index jumps 35% as markets sell off on rate fears
Mixed signals: futures rebound after sharp intraday reversal

ground_truth.explanation: High volatility with no clear trend and an unconfirmed setup (price below the 10-day average). The universal rule is to reduce risk; the disciplined action is to stand aside rather than add or guess direction.
